zh.Long Ashton, , Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 薩默塞特朗 艾希頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Amerike於1430年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 薩默塞特朗 艾希頓時，他的父親Meryk Amerike30歲，母親Mrs. Meryk Amerike25歲。他於1452年與Lady Lucy Wells在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年9月9日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年60歲。

variants.name: Amrein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Benno, Hans Peter, Kurt.
South German, chiefly Swiss German: topographic name from am ‘at’ + Rain ‘edge of plowed land’.
German: altered form of   Amrhein  . Compare   Amerine   and   Amrine  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Amerike was born in 1430, in Long Ashton, North Somerset, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Meryk Amerike, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Meryk Amerike, was 25. He married Lady Lucy Wells in 1452, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1490, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Amerike est né en 1430, à Long Ashton, North Somerset, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Meryk Amerike, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Meryk Amerike, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Lucy Wells en 1452, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1490, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.Long Ashton, , Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 서머세트 론그 애슈턴
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Amerike(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meryk Amerike(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Meryk Amerike(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 Lady Lucy Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 9월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Long Ashton, , Somerset, England: лонг аштон, норт сомирсет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Amerike родился в 1430 г. в местности лонг аштон, норт сомирсет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Meryk Amerike было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Meryk Amerike, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Lucy Wells в 1452 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1490 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
